name: Siege Engineer Hatchet
description: A squad of competent engineers can determine the outcome of an entire siege. Therefore, it pays to keep them well-protected and properly armed: tunnel skirmishes beneath the walls are a common occurrence.
descriptionZh: 一队得力的攻城兵可以决定整场围城战的结果，因此有必要确保他们防护完备，武装得当，毕竟城墙下的地道战对他们而言是家常便饭。
